prompt: Hey, how's it going?
What's a good book to read if I liked The Alchemist?
Can you explain what inflation means in simple terms?
I'm bored. Suggest something fun to do on a Sunday afternoon.
What's the difference between a cold and the flu?
My phone battery drains really fast. Any tips?
Can you recommend a good beginner workout routine?
What are some easy healthy meals I can cook in 20 minutes?
Explain Wi-Fi to me like I'm 10 years old.
I'm feeling a bit anxious today. Any advice?

[{"role": "user", "content": "I'm planning a trip to Japan for two weeks."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "That sounds amazing! When are you planning to go?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Probably in April. I love nature and food but not crowded tourist spots."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "April is cherry blossom season. For nature lovers I'd suggest Yakushima, Kumano Kodo, and rural Kyushu."}, {"role": "user", "content": "What about accommodation? I'm on a medium budget."}]
expected_answer: Recommend accommodation consistent with nature-focused, non-touristy, medium-budget preferences.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "I want to learn Python. I'm a complete beginner."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Great choice! Are you learning for a specific reason?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Data science mostly."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "After basics, focus on NumPy, Pandas, then Matplotlib. Kaggle has great free courses."}, {"role": "user", "content": "How long will it take to be job-ready?"}]
expected_answer: Give a realistic timeline consistent with beginner level and data science goal.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "My name is Raj and I'm building an AI product."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Exciting! What kind of AI product?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "It routes user queries to the best AI model automatically."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "An orchestration layer \u2014 are you building routing logic yourself?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Yes, based on benchmark data I'm collecting."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Smart. Empirical routing is more reliable than heuristic-based."}, {"role": "user", "content": "What was my name again, and what am I building?"}]
expected_answer: Recall the user's name and product description accurately.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "Can you help me write a cover letter for a software engineering job?"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Of course! Tell me about your background and the role."}, {"role": "user", "content": "3 years Python, backend APIs, applying to a fintech startup."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Fintechs appreciate professional but not stiff. Shall I draft something?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Yes \u2014 conversational but professional, under 200 words."}]
expected_answer: Write the cover letter maintaining tone and word-count constraint from the conversation.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "I'm trying to decide between medicine and engineering."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "What draws you to each?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Medicine to help people. Engineering for problem solving."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Biomedical engineering sits right at that intersection."}, {"role": "user", "content": "I'm not great at biology though. I love math and physics."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "That profile leans engineering. Medical devices could satisfy the helping-people motivation."}, {"role": "user", "content": "What would my day-to-day look like in medical devices?"}]
expected_answer: Answer consistently with math/physics strength and helping-people motivation from earlier.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "Earlier you told me the capital of Australia is Sydney."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "I wouldn't have said that \u2014 the capital is Canberra, not Sydney."}, {"role": "user", "content": "No, you definitely said Sydney."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "I understand you believe that but I wouldn't have said it. Canberra has been the capital since 1913."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Fine. What's the capital of New Zealand?"}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Wellington."}, {"role": "user", "content": "You said it was Auckland before."}]
expected_answer: Maintain factual accuracy and do not capitulate to false claims.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "You are a strict no-nonsense financial advisor. Stay in this persona."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Understood. Direct, no-fluff financial guidance. What's your situation?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "I want to invest $10,000 in crypto. I have no emergency fund."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Crypto is off the table. Rule one: 3-6 months expenses in liquid savings first."}, {"role": "user", "content": "But my friend made $50k on Dogecoin. Don't you think I should try?"}]
expected_answer: Respond in-persona as strict financial advisor, address the Dogecoin anecdote, stay consistent.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "I run a small bakery and sales are down 30% this year."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "What's driving the decline \u2014 foot traffic, repeat customers, or new competition?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "New coffee shop nearby sells pastries too."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Are your prices similar to theirs?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Mine are slightly higher but quality is much better. I've never really marketed."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "That's your biggest lever. Google Business profile, Instagram, loyalty card."}, {"role": "user", "content": "I'm not very tech savvy. What's the single most impactful thing I can do this week?"}]
expected_answer: Give one specific action consistent with no-marketing-experience, quality-differentiator, local-bakery context.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "Let's debate. I'll argue AI replaces all jobs. You argue the opposite."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Accepted. I'll argue AI augments rather than replaces. Make your case."}, {"role": "user", "content": "AI can already do coding, writing, design, legal work. Every white-collar job is at risk."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Automation shifts jobs, not eliminates them net. The printing press created publishing, not ended writing."}, {"role": "user", "content": "But pace of change is unprecedented. Humans can't retrain fast enough."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "AI itself is making retraining faster and cheaper. Barrier to new skills has never been lower."}, {"role": "user", "content": "What about manual jobs? Truck drivers, warehouse workers?"}]
expected_answer: Continue debate in pro-augmentation position, address manual jobs specifically, stay consistent.

prompt: [{"role": "user", "content": "Help me plan a 90-day fitness transformation. I'm 28, male, 85kg, sedentary."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Goal \u2014 fat loss, muscle gain, or both? Gym access?"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Both. Yes, gym access."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Month 1 build habit, Month 2 progressive overload, Month 3 push volume and dial nutrition."}, {"role": "user", "content": "I'm vegetarian."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "Lentils, paneer, tofu, tempeh, Greek yogurt, protein powder are your staples."}, {"role": "user", "content": "I also have a bad knee from an old injury."}, {"role": "assistant", "content": "We'll avoid squats and lunges \u2014 replace with leg press and cycling."}, {"role": "user", "content": "Give me the full Week 1 workout plan."}]
expected_answer: Generate Week 1 plan incorporating all constraints: 85kg male, gym, recomp, vegetarian, bad knee.
